steps.title: Identify the chronological progression
steps.content: The passage moves through time: Shakespeare arrived in 1585, was becoming known by 1593, and in 1600 would create another masterpiece. The blank must signal movement forward from 1593 to 1600.

steps.title: Match the transition type
steps.content:
Later directly expresses forward temporal progression, connecting the 1593 milestone to the 1600 achievement.

Conversely marks contradiction, Thus marks cause-and-effect, and In other words signals reformulation—none match this chronological structure.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
